description: List Wbs Code for a given project

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[search]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) matching the specified search query string.

parameters.name: filters[scope]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) matching the specified scope.

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: Return groups with the specified filter ID. Supported values: `status`, `segment_id-tier_depth`. For example: `group=500-1` will return objects with all values of tier 2 of the segment with id 500.

attribute_1_name.description: Wbs Attribute Item Name for Attribute 1.

attribute_2_name.description: Wbs Attribute Item Name for Attribute 2.

attribute_3_name.description: Wbs Attribute Item Name for Attribute 3.

code.description: Wbs Code Code. Is a concatenation of the Segment Items' codes in the Pattern order with delimiter `.`

description.description: Wbs Code Description. Default is a concatenation of the Segment Items' names in the Pattern order with delimiter `.`.
